material_claims.claim: SCORE or Faction Fleet had a public release record in December 2021.
The March and April 2024 records support an announced Faction Fleet emissions transition and a stated Starbased live date of 2024-04-04.
Starbased launched with zero ATLAS in the first epoch and Loyalty Point deposits disabled, so software availability and full economic activation remain separate.
SAGE is a product-family identity whose SAGE Labs, Starbased, SAGE 3D, and C4 surfaces require separate lifecycle states.
Faction Fleet emissions were conclusively shut down on the announced April 2024 schedule.
material_claims.reason: The preserved records are forward-looking plan and pre-event statements; no post-event parameter or transaction evidence confirms execution.

material_claims.claim: SAGE 3D has a precise official release date or C4 testing proves a general SAGE production release.
material_claims.reason: SAGE 3D remains supported only by month-level community retrospective evidence, and PTR evidence establishes testing rather than production.

known_limitations: The SCORE application, SCORE program, Faction Fleet emissions, SAGE family, and each later named surface are not interchangeable entities.
Atlas Brew evidence supports recording-level and timestamp-level context without named-speaker attribution.
Current availability and uninterrupted operation of historical surfaces are not independently established.
